description_long: This object is a tall, vertical utility structure composed primarily of a sturdy central pole with two prominent horizontal crossarms near the top. At the uppermost level, there are multiple blue-green ceramic or composite insulator stacks supporting thick power lines, with a brown central block likely serving as a busbar or connector. Below the crossarms, a gray electrical box is mounted to the pole, and several metallic braces and cables provide structural support. At the base and around the pole, there are various electrical components, including a large transformer unit, solar panels, a satellite dish, and other utility equipment. The overall construction is robust, with metallic and composite materials dominating the structure, and the equipment at the base suggests a multi-functional power distribution role.
description: A tall utility pole with two crossarms, insulator stacks, and various electrical equipment including a transformer and solar panels at the base. The structure is metallic and robust, designed for urban power distribution.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, both crossarms, insulator stacks, and a clear view of the transformer, solar panels, and satellite dish at the base.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side of the pole, the electrical box, and a partial view of the equipment at the base.
description_view_2: Rear-side view with a focus on the back of the crossarms, insulator stacks, and a clearer look at the brown equipment and wiring.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the transformer, solar panels, and satellite dish from a different angle, with the crossarms and insulators visible from behind.
attribute_arrangement_of_crossarms: There are two horizontal crossarms arranged in parallel at different heights, each spanning across the pole and supporting insulator stacks at their ends.
attribute_configuration_of_attached_powe: There are three main power lines arranged in a parallel, three-phase configuration, each supported by insulator stacks on the crossarms, with the lines running horizontally and spaced evenly.
